doc.title: Synthetic sensor disagreement
doc.description: Fully synthetic; does not reproduce any real incident or bag.
doc.scenario_label: Sensor disagreement — front distance reads obstacle-near while LiDAR reads clear; evidence conflicts.
doc.root_cause: Sensors disagree: the front-distance metric drops below threshold (reads an obstacle) while the LiDAR scan is clear and no safety stop fired. An obstacle stop cannot be confirmed from conflicting evidence.
